name: fondeo
description: Fondeo monorepo - Rails API + React Frontend

scripts.dev: npm run cleanup && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: cd api && bundle exec rails server
scripts.cleanup: bash -c 'if [ -f api/tmp/pids/server.pid ]; then kill -9 $(cat api/tmp/pids/server.pid) 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f api/tmp/pids/server.pid; fi'
scripts.setup: npm run setup:api && npm run setup:web
scripts.setup:api: cd api && bundle install && rails db:create db:migrate
